clause_text: This RENTAL AGREEMENT is made and executed on this the 12th day of August, 2024, at Bengaluru, BETWEEN: Sri. Gagan T Patel, S/o. Trishulpani Patel, aged about 35 years, residing at #148, RMV 1st stage, 2nd block 1st main road, Dollars Colony, Bangalore 560094. Referred to as the "OWNER" or the Party of the first part AND Joyalukkas India LTD. (PAN – AABCJ 1087G), a company incorporated under the companies Act 1956, having its Registered Office at Door No 5/309-3, Bishop Alapatt Road, Fathima Nagar, Mission Quarters, Therissur 680005, Referred to as the "TENANT" or the Party of the Second Part represented by its Authorised Signatory and Regional Manager Mr. Jinesh V S duly authorized vide Board Resolution dated 08.12.2021. Both the parties have agreed to the terms and conditions and which term shall mean and include their legal heirs, respective heirs, executors, administrators, legal representatives and assigns.

The Party of the first part is the absolute owner of all that piece and parcel of Flat Bearing No. B1 on the first floor of the multistoried building known as "Farvella Apartments" situated at No. 92/1, Lavelle Road, Bangalore 560001 having super-built up area of 1570 Sq. Ft. (hereinafter referred to as the 'Schedule Premise' more fully described in the Schedule hereunder).

The Party of the Second Part is desirous to taking on rent, the Schedule Premise and the Lessor has agreed to give on rent, the Schedule Premise to the Lessee on the following mutually agreed terms and conditions.

That in consideration of the rents hereinafter reserved and agreed to be paid by the Tenant to the Owner, and the Tenant agreeing to comply with the covenants and conditions as set out in this Rental Agreement, the Owner does hereby grant and demise unto the Tenant the Scheduled Premises for a period of Three Years / Eleven (11) months.

The Owner and the Tenant hereby agree that the term of the Rent created hereunder shall be for a period of Three years / Eleven months commencing from (hereinafter referred to as the "Effective Date") i.e., from 10.08.2024 to 10.07.2027. The instant Rental Agreement shall come into effect from 10.08.2024.

It is further understood and agreed to between the parties that any renewal beyond the period prescribed shall be by the execution of a fresh rental agreement on such terms and conditions as mutually agreed to by the parties.

After completion of the tenancy period of 11 (eleven) months / 3 years as mentioned above, the instant agreement can be renewed through execution of a fresh agreement for a further term of 11 (eleven) months / 3 years on such mutually agreeable terms, with a 5% enhancement in the lease rental of the previous year. Upon culmination of 3 years / 11 (eleven) months the agreement is deemed to be terminated due to efflux of time.

The Tenant shall pay to the Owner a monthly rent of Rs. 1,00,000 (Rupees One Lakh Only) inclusive of maintenance charges for the Schedule Premises (hereinafter referred to as the "Rent") for the rent of the Schedule Premise.
The rent shall be paid by the Tenant to the Owner on or before the 5th day of every succeeding month for which the same is due and such payment shall be by way of cheques/ NEFT payable at Bangalore.
The TDS shall be deducted from the above said rental amount as per the existing Income Tax ACT, and the certificate against such deductions shall be issued in accordance with the IT Rules.

The rent for 1st year shall be Rs.1,00,000/- (from 10-08-2024 to 10-07-2025) per month. The rent for 2nd year shall enchase by 5% That is Rs 1,05,000 (for the period of 10-08-2025 to 10-08-2026). Further, 5% increase in the following year which is Rs 1,10,250 (for the period 10-08-2026 to 10-08-2027).

As security for due discharge by the Tenant of his obligations, the Tenant has agreed to pay a sum of Rs. 6,00,000 (Rupees Six Lakhs only) as interest free refundable security deposit. The parties have agreed that the said sum of Rs. 6,00,000/- (Rupees Six Lakh only) shall be paid as advance by way of Cheque bearing No. _____________

The entire security deposit shall be refunded by the Owner to the Tenant simultaneously with the return of possession of the Schedule Premise on the expiry or earlier termination of the Rental Agreement subject to deductions if any, pertaining to maintenance of the Apartment such as painting, cleaning, restoration of any damages.

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: To promptly pay the monthly rent in respect of the Schedule Premise in terms of this Rental Agreement;

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: To pay all the charges for the electricity and water consumed in the Schedule Premise during the term of the agreement as per the bills raised from time to time;

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: Not to carry out any structural additions or alterations in the Schedule Premise without obtaining prior consent of the Owner;

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: To keep the Schedule Premise clean and usable and to undertake minor repairs on the Schedule Premise as and when necessary;

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: To use the Schedule Premise exclusively for residential purpose of the Tenant. The Tenant shall ensure that the use and occupation of the Schedule Premise does not cause a nuisance to the Owner or any occupants of the adjoining units in the building. The Tenant shall keep the Owner fully indemnified in this regard;

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: Not to sub-let, under-let, sub-lease, sublicense or otherwise part with possession of the Schedule Premise or any portion thereof in favor of any third party/parties;

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: The Tenant shall undertake not to commit any unlawful or illegal activities at the Schedule premises.

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: The Tenant further undertakes not to store any industrial material, explosives or industrial combustible substances at the Schedule Premises.

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: The Tenant further undertakes to adhere to all the waste segregation measures as stipulated by the BBMP in waste disposal and avoid unnecessary penalties and levies due to noncompliance.

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: That the Tenant shall keep the schedule premises in good and tenantable condition without causing any damages. In case of any damage to the premises including any fittings or fixtures, furnishing, woodwork, false ceiling works, metal and other support structure, then the Owner shall deduct the cost of the damages from the Tenant's security deposit and will be addressed by the Owner at the tenant's expense. Any minor day-to-day repairs pertaining to electrical fittings, plumbing items etc. shall be attended by the Tenant at their own expense.

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: If the Sewage lines are blocked due to disposing of un-dissolvable waste, etc., the Tenant shall be responsible to get them cleared at his/her own expense.

clause_title: COVENANTS OF THE LEASE – OBLIGATIONS OF THE TENANT
clause_text: The Owner is entitled to enter the premises after giving reasonable notice to the Tenant to inspect the property, and to see that the same is used in accordance with the agreed conditions at reasonable hours during the day.

That the Owner along with his wife are the sole and absolute owner of the Schedule Premise and has the absolute and unencumbered right to lease the Schedule Premise and is authorized by his wife as well to execute the instant Rental Agreement. There is otherwise no legal impediment to lease the Schedule Premise.

The Owner hereby represents and warrants that he has clear, absolute, unrestricted and unfettered right to grant lease of the Schedule Premise and that the Schedule Premise is free from legal disabilities so as to enable the Tenant to effectively use the Schedule Premise in a manner satisfactory to the Tenant.

That the Tenant paying the Rent herein reserved and performing the terms and conditions on the Tenant's part herein contained, the Tenant shall be entitled to peaceful and quiet use and enjoyment of the Schedule Premise during the lease period.
Upon the expiry of the agreement or its earlier termination thereof, to refund the security deposit.
forthwith to the Tenant, the Security Deposit paid by the Tenant to the Owner, subject to such deductions as prescribed above.

On termination of the tenancy the TENANT shall deliver back vacant possession of the schedule property along with Furniture, electronic items, fittings and all the fixtures to the OWNER in good working conditions in which it was let out subject only to any change caused by normal wear and tear.

At the time of vacating the schedule premises, the Tenant agrees to get the premises cleaned by professional cleaners like Urban Company or any other such cleaners approved by the Owner and return it in the same condition as it was handed over. Further, if any Furniture, Electronic items, fittings and fixtures or other hardware fixtures are broken or damaged, the actual cost of the fitting & fixture with labor charges and applicable taxes shall be deducted from the security deposit. Furthermore, the tenant agrees to pay for the painting charge upon termination which shall be done through the owner's recommended painters.

That the duration of this Rental Agreement shall be fixed for a period of 3 years, commencing from 10th August 2024 to 10th August 2027. Neither party shall have the right to terminate the lease during the initial term of 3 years except in the case of mutual understanding or in case of non-payment of rent for consecutive 2 months or delay in the payment of rent for 2 consecutive months, in which case, the Tenant must vacate the Scheduled Premises, without notice. This due amount, if applicable, shall be deductible from the Security Deposit.

If the whole of the Schedule Premise is at any time, destroyed or damaged by a Force Majeure event such as fire or other causality or accident, strike, war or other violence, any law, or regulation of any Government or any act or condition whatsoever beyond the reasonable control of the Owner (and not due to any act, neglect or default of the Tenant), so as to be rendered inaccessible or uninhabitable for a period beyond two (2) months, the Tenant shall have the right to terminate the lease with immediate effect, without any cost or liability, including the liability of payment of rent for the said period of two (2) months during which the Leased Premises is effected by such Force Majeure event.

In the event the Owner intends to terminate the instant Rental Agreement due to personal reasons, the same may be terminated without assigning any reasons with a prior notice of 60 days to the Tenant.
In the event the Tenant intends to terminate the instant Lease Deed due to personal reasons, the same may be terminated with a prior notice of 60 days to the Owner.

Upon termination, the Owner and the Tenant shall be released from all obligations and liabilities to the other occurring or arising after the date of such termination, provided that no such termination will relieve either party hereto from any liability arising under this agreement occurring prior to termination. Any provision of this agreement, which is expressly or by implication to continue in force after termination, shall continue in full force and effect.
In the event of any dispute the parties will be subject to the jurisdiction of the Courts at Bengaluru.

All that piece and parcel of the apartment/ flat no. B-1, on the 1st floor in the building known as “Farvella Apartments” constructed on the property bearing no No. 92/1 and having a super built area of 1570 Square Feet situated at Lavelle Road, Bangalore 560001 comprising of 3 bedrooms with 3 attached bathrooms, 1 utility, 2 balconies, kitchen, dining and Living area , and the right to use one demarcated car parking slot numbered marked as B1 parking.

Fixed Furniture: 5 no's of wardrobes, 1 wall partition, Kitchen wall units and base units, 1 metal utility unit for sink and washing machine, 3 no's of vanity units under sinks in bathrooms, and 3 mirrors with light units, Hob and chimney unit Movable Furniture: 1 TV unit, 3 cots with mattresses in each bedroom, 1 six seater convertible dining table with 8 chairs, 1 sofa set with 2 pieces, 1 large Size Ottoman, Living room table set of 2 Electrical items: 3 geysers in bathrooms, 3 Exhaust fans in the bathrooms, lights in each room, 5 no's of ceiling fans. Ceiling lights in balcony, kitchen and utility and 2 air conditioners, Refrigerator, Microwave, RO water purifier, washing machine, Dish washer and Wi-Fi Router. Additional Air Conditioner of Godrej make installed by Tenant however cost of the Air Conditioner shall be deducted by Tenant from the first month’s rental as agreed between the parties. Total 3 Air Conditioners. Furnishing: Curtains in all 3 bed rooms, Curtains in 3 bathrooms, curtains in living room and dining room. and velvet fabrics (gold color) on master bed room

In witness whereof, the OWNER and the TENANT have signed the Deed on this _______, _______and year, as mentioned above. WITNESSES: OWNER 1. [Gagan T Patel ] 2. TENENT [Joyalukkas India LTD. ] Mr. Jinesh V S
